creator: koue@chaosophia.net
text:
Created attachment 148365
spandsp update to version 0.0.6

Update comms/spandsp to version 0.0.6.

portlint looks fine.
make check-plist looks fine.
make stage-qa looks fine.

I've tried few times to build the port in redports.org but every time the status was 'dud' - this port is marked as ignore and build cannot be started. Few times I've asked somebody to help why the port is masked as ignore but still no reply. I've tested the build on 10.0 amd64 and everything went fine.
